# CircleCI CLI

Get the current value of an advanced org setting.

JSON fields: name, value

Available settings:
| Name                                     | Description                                                   |
| ---------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- |
| ai-error-summarization                   | Enable AI-powered error summarization                         |
| ai-agents                                | Enable AI agents for this organization                        |
| unversioned-config                       | Allow triggering pipelines without a config file              |
| certified-public-orbs                    | Allow use of certified public orbs                            |
| chunk-ip-ranges                          | Enable chunk IP ranges for this organization                  |
| minor-ai-features                        | Enable minor AI features for this organization                |
| private-orbs                             | Allow use of private orbs                                     |
| uncertified-public-orbs                  | Allow use of uncertified public orbs                          |
| bitbucket-workspace-member-is-org-member | Treat Bitbucket workspace members as org members              |
| disable-user-checkout-keys               | Disable user checkout keys for this organization              |
| disable-running                          | Disable all builds for this organization                      |
| image-brownouts                          | Enable image brownout warnings for this organization          |
| context-group-restriction                | Require context group restriction for this organization       |
| resource-class-brownouts                 | Enable resource class brownout warnings for this organization |
| runner-tos-accepted                      | Mark runner terms of service as accepted                      |

For more information about output formatting flags, see `circleci help formatting`.

## Usage

`circleci org setting get <setting> [flags]`

## Flags

| Flag           | Description                                                       |
| -------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `--jq string`  | Process values from the response using jq syntax                  |
| `--json`       | Output as JSON                                                    |
| `--org string` | Organization slug (e.g. gh/myorg) or UUID; defaults to git remote |

## Inherited Flags

| Flag                  | Description                                                  |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `-c, --config string` | Path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml) |
| `--debug`             | Enable debug logging                                         |
| `--no-color`          | Disable ANSI color output (same as setting NO_COLOR)         |
| `-q, --quiet`         | Suppress informational output. Data on stdout is unaffected  |

## Examples

- Get a setting for the current org: 
  `circleci org settings get private-orbs`
- Get a setting for a specific org: 
  `circleci org settings get private-orbs --org gh/myorg`
- Output as JSON: 
  `circleci org settings get private-orbs --json`

## Learn More

- Use `circleci <command> <subcommand> --help` for more information about a command.
- Read the manual at <https://cli.circleci.com/reference/>
- Support at <https://github.com/CircleCI-Public/circleci-cli/issues>
